articles.title: Year of free HPE software a “step in the correct direction” in VMware rivalry
articles.content: Partner tells Ars that HPE should be giving out more free VM Essentials licenses.
articles.titleZh: 免费HPE软件年份是VMware竞争中“朝着正确方向迈出的一步”
articles.contentZh: 合作伙伴告诉ARS ， HPE应该发放更多免费的VM Essentials许可证。

articles.title: Critical Copilot vulnerability allowed hackers to steal 2FA code from users
articles.content: SearchLeak exploit shows why the industry's approach to LLM security fails over and over.
articles.titleZh: 严重的Copilot漏洞允许黑客窃取用户的2FA代码
articles.contentZh: SearchLeak漏洞说明了为什么行业的LLM安全方法一遍又一遍地失败。

articles.title: Users cry foul after AMD stripped memory crypto from its consumer CPUs
articles.content: AMD's stripping of TSME from consumer CPUs appears to be a deliberate, covert move.
articles.titleZh: AMD从其消费者CPU中剥离内存加密后，用户哭泣犯规
articles.contentZh: AMD从消费者CPU中剥离TSME似乎是一个蓄意的、秘密的举动。

articles.title: PeopleSoft 0-day affecting hundreds of organizations steals gigabytes of data
articles.content: Vulnerability in the Oracle-owned PeopleSoft software is about as critical as they come.
articles.titleZh: PeopleSoft 0-day影响数百个组织窃取数千兆字节的数据
articles.contentZh: Oracle拥有的PeopleSoft软件中的漏洞与它们一样严重。

articles.title: The Complete Calvin and Hobbes is a great last-minute Father’s Day gift
articles.content: Father’s Day is nearly here. Hopefully, you already got a gift for dads you care about, but if not, here’s a quick, easy recommendation for anyone who enjoys a good comic strip. The Complete Calvin and Hobbes contains every one of Bill Watterson’s beloved strips made during the comic’s ten-year run from 1985 through 1995, […]
articles.titleZh: 完整的《加尔文与霍布斯》是父亲节最后一刻的绝佳礼物
articles.contentZh: 父亲节快到了。希望您已经为您关心的爸爸准备了礼物，但如果没有，这里有一个快速，简单的推荐给任何喜欢漫画的人。完整的加尔文和霍布斯包含了比尔·沃特森在漫画从1985年到1995年的十年间制作的每一个心爱的条带， […]

articles.title: All the latest news on Android 17, Wear OS 7, and Android XR
articles.content: Google’s Android 17 update includes highlights like new floating “Bubble” app windows for easier multitasking, a Screen Reaction recording mode, and a 50/50 split gaming mode for foldable phones. Meanwhile, Wear OS 7 brings Live Updates and better battery life for smart watches, and it prepares connections for new Android XR smart glasses that will […]
articles.titleZh: Android 17、Wear OS 7和Android XR的所有最新消息
articles.contentZh: 谷歌的Android 17更新包括新的浮动“气泡”应用窗口、屏幕反应录制模式和可折叠手机的50/50分割游戏模式等亮点。与此同时， Wear OS 7为智能手表带来了实时更新和更长的电池寿命，并为新的Android XR智能眼镜准备连接，这将[…]
